full_description: Pick up the gray block, inspect the hidden colored inset on its underside, then place it on the sorting region with the same color.
schema: {A} denotes the gray block with a hidden underside inset, {B} denotes the matching sorting region, {a} denotes the arm used to manipulate the block, {c} denotes the hidden underside color
preference: Mention that the visible outer color is not enough and the robot must manipulate the block to inspect the underside before sorting.
seen: Pick up {A}, inspect its hidden {c} underside inset, then place it on {B}.
Use {a} to lift the gray block, look at the underside color, and sort it to the matching region.
Manipulate {A} so the bottom inset is visible, identify {c}, then put it on {B}.
Do not sort by the gray outside; inspect the underside of {A} and use that color for sorting.
Flip the lifted block to reveal its underside marker, then place it in the {c} region.
unseen: Inspect the block's hidden underside color and sort it accordingly.
Lift and turn the block to see its bottom marker before placing it.
Sort the gray block by the color hidden on its underside.

seen: observe the outside of {A}; the underside color is still hidden
unseen: look at the gray block before manipulating it

seen: pick up {A} with {a} to expose its underside
turn {A} and identify the hidden underside marker: {c}
place {A} on {B} after using the underside color
unseen: sort the block to the matching color region
